# zstack_port_mirror_session (Resource)

Manages a port mirror session in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dst_end_point` (String) The destination endpoint.
- `name` (String) The name of the port mirror session.
- `port_mirror_uuid` (String) The UUID of the port mirror.
- `src_end_point` (String) The source endpoint.
- `type` (String) The type of the port mirror session.

### Optional

- `description` (String) A description for the port mirror session.

### Read-Only

- `internal_id` (Number) The internal ID of the port mirror session.
- `status` (String) The status of the port mirror session.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the port mirror session.
